title: Gayton Windmill
summary:
Gayton Windmill may refer to a number of windmills in the United Kingdom.

Gayton Windmill, a post mill which stood at TF 735 192
Gayton Windmill, a tower mill which stands at TF 735 192
Gayton Windmill SJ 278 812, a tower mill in present-day Merseyside
